name: Kiro Tan
title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
bio: Leads architecture and implementation across Next.js and React projects. Obsessively precise about types, security boundaries, and production quality.

name: Nova Ellis
title: Design Systems Lead
bio: Owns the component library, design tokens, and visual language. Ensures every pixel is intentional and every interaction is polished.

name: Mira Chen

bio: Drives acceptance criteria, test coverage, and story sign-off. Nothing ships without Mira's green light.
